channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Trump Faces Criticism for Delayed Response to Soldier Deaths in Iranian Attacks
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump drew widespread criticism for his delayed and dismissive response to the deaths of three American soldiers killed in Iranian drone attacks over the weekend. The victims, Ja...

item.title: Jelly Roll and Bunnie Xo finalize divorce after decade-long marriage
item.description: Country singer Jelly Roll and his ex-wife, Bunnie Xo, have reportedly finalized their divorce after nearly a decade of marriage. According to court documents obtained by multiple outlets, the couple e...

item.title: BARMM Police Ordered to Maintain Neutrality Ahead of Parliamentary Elections
item.description: The Bangsamoro Autonomous Region in Muslim Mindanao (BARMM) police have been instructed to remain non-partisan as security preparations intensify for the region's historic parliamentary elections sche...

item.title: Vehicle Collides with Hydro Pole in Barrie, Ontario
item.description: A vehicle crashed into a hydro pole in Barrie, Ontario, on July 21, 2026. The incident occurred during evening hours, prompting local authorities to investigate the cause and assess any damage to infr...

item.title: Congress Protesters Clash with Security at PM Modi's Residence
item.description: A significant protest by Congress leaders, including Rahul Gandhi and Priyanka Gandhi Vadra, unfolded outside Prime Minister Narendra Modi's residence in Delhi. The demonstration, which caught securit...

item.title: Court hears testimony of security officer involved in Sibanyoni shooting ambush
item.description: The Johannesburg High Court heard a detailed account of the 2022 ambush of taxi magnate Joe 'Ferrari' Sibanyoni, as security officer Bethuel Cele testified about the chaotic incident. Cele described h...

item.title: Public sector union criticises delayed pay offer and inflation-linked payments
item.description: The Australian Education Union (AEU) ACT branch president, Angela Burroughs, has condemned the government's revised public sector pay offer as a 'cynical' proposal that fails to address immediate cost...

item.title: Kenya Court Auctions Property to Recover Loan Default
item.description: A Kenyan court has ordered the auction of a multi-story building to recover a debt of 10 million shillings, highlighting growing trends in debt recovery through asset seizures. This case reflects lend...

item.title: Colorado River Reservoirs Reach Record Lows, Exacerbating Water Crisis
item.description: The Colorado River’s largest reservoirs, Lake Mead and Lake Powell, have declined to their lowest combined levels on record, highlighting an escalating water crisis across seven states reliant on the ...

item.title: Legal Threat Against Individual Who Called for Execution of Political Figure
item.description: A legal team representing Nnamdi Kanu, the leader of the proscribed Indigenous People of Biafra (IPOB), has threatened to sue a man who publicly urged the Nigerian government to execute their client. ...

item.title: Australia's Track and Field Pros Shine at Commonwealth Games
item.description: The article highlights Australia's strongest ever track and field team for the Commonwealth Games, featuring athletes like Eddie Nketia, Lachie Kennedy, and Kurtis Marschall. It details their medal po...

item.title: Raytheon extends $1.8 billion contract to supply SPY-6 radar systems for U.S. Navy fleet modernization
item.description: Raytheon has secured a $1.8 billion contract extension to produce and support SPY-6 radar systems for the U.S. Navy, expanding a program expected to equip over 50 ships by 2036. The deal builds on an ...

item.title: APC Chairman Engages with NDC Chieftains to Promote Unity in Kano
item.description: Professor Nentawe Yilwatda, National Chairman of APC, continued his engagement with opposition figures in Kano by visiting Senator Kabiru Ibrahim Gaya, a former APC member who later joined NDC. The me...

item.title: Tanzania's Private Sector Credit Grows 23% Annually, Fueling Economic Expansion
item.description: Tanzania's private sector credit has surged by over 22% in the year through May, reaching 49 trillion shillings from approximately 40 trillion shillings the previous year. This growth, driven by comme...

item.title: Arci Muñoz Discusses Collaborative Challenges in 'Sigabo' with Coco Martin and Julia Montes
item.description: The article highlights Arci Muñoz's insights into the most challenging scenes she has performed in the Philippine television series 'Sigabo', starring alongside Coco Martin and Julia Montes. Published...

item.title: Los Angeles Officials Work to Repair Major Water Main Rupture on Sunset Boulevard
item.description: A major water main rupture on Sunset Boulevard in Los Angeles has caused significant disruption, with the street closed for six days. The 17-million-gallon leak, originating from a 1916 riveted steel ...

item.title: Trump Uses AI Video to Claim Curing Celebrities' 'Syndrome'
item.description: Donald Trump has posted an AI-generated video portraying himself as a doctor who claims to have cured celebrities of 'Trump derangement syndrome,' a fictional illness he uses to describe critics. The ...

item.title: East African Creatives to Showcase Work at Tanzania Expo
item.description: The Mashariki Creative Economy Expo 2026, organized by Culture and Development East Africa (CDEA), will take place in Dar es Salaam from August 18-21, 2026. This event aims to unite designers, artists...

item.title: Zack Apella's Family Appeals for Burial Fund as Supporters Revert Donations
item.description: Zack Apella's brother, Solo, updated followers on the status of the late content creator's burial fundraiser during a TikTok Live session. The family revealed the total budget for the burial stands at...
